title: Fundamentals
description: The complete technical foundation for Business Central developers. Master AL from syntax and environment setup through tables, pages, reports, integration, and event-driven architecture — all in one structured course.
shortDescription: Complete AL & BC development path — from zero to extension developer.
learningOutcomes: Understand AL syntax, data types, and control structures
Set up VS Code, Docker, and publish your first extension
Create tables, pages, reports, and codeunits
Build page UIs including Card, List, and Document pages
Integrate BC with external systems via web services and APIs
Use event subscribers for upgrade-safe customization
